search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:organizations" | dedup id | table id, name

`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:summarytopappliancesbyutilization" $orgid$ | dedup utilization.average.percentage serial | rename utilization.average.percentage as utilization_percentage, name as "Appliance Name" | eval utilization_percentage = round(utilization_percentage,2) | timechart avg(utilization_percentage) as avg_utilization by "Appliance Name" span=1h

`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:summarytopappliancesbyutilization" $orgid$ | dedup utilization.average.percentage serial | rename utilization.average.percentage as avg_per | eval utilization.average.percentage=round(avg_per,2) | rename name as "Name", utilization.average.percentage as "Utilization Percentage", network.name as "Network Name", model as "Model", serial as "Serial" | table "Name", "Utilization Percentage", "Network Name", "Model", "Serial" | sort 10 - "Utilization Percentage"

drilldown.link: search?q=`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:summarytopappliancesbyutilization" $orgid$ | dedup utilization.average.percentage serial | rename utilization.average.percentage as avg_per | eval utilization.average.percentage=round(avg_per,2) | search name="$row.Name$" utilization.average.percentage="$row.Utilization Percentage$" network.name="$row.Network Name$" model="$row.Model$" serial="$row.Serial$" &earliest=$time.earliest$&latest=$time.latest$

search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:summarytopappliancesbyutilization" $orgid$ | dedup utilization.average.percentage serial | rename utilization.average.percentage as ut_percentage | eval ut_percentage=round(ut_percentage,2) | where ut_percentage < 10 | rename name as "Name", ut_percentage as "Utilization Percentage", network.name as "Network Name", model as "Model", serial as "Serial" | table "Name", "Utilization Percentage","Network Name", "Model", "Serial" | sort 10 "Utilization Percentage"

drilldown.link: search?q=`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:summarytopappliancesbyutilization" $orgid$ | dedup utilization.average.percentage serial | rename utilization.average.percentage as avg_per | eval utilization.average.percentage=round(avg_per,2) | search name="$row.Name$" utilization.average.percentage="$row.Utilization Percentage$" network.name="$row.Network Name$" model="$row.Model$" serial="$row.Serial$"&earliest=$time.earliest$&latest=$time.latest$
